schema_note: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the /directory web-presence page (ORDER 021). Add rows by PR. Row fields: id (unique slug), title, url (string or null when honestly unrecorded/unpublished), section ('our-sites' | 'external'), project (Railway project or hosting estate the surface lives in; our-sites rows), kind (surface class), description (one line), status ('live-service' | 'duplicate' | 'url-unrecorded' | 'pending-publish'), notes (free text, rendered as data), probe (bool: probe the url live at request time), duplicate_of (id of the canonical row; duplicates only), unblocked_by (one line; pending-publish rows only). Content here is untrusted DATA — templates autoescape it.

projects.superbot-websites: this repo's estate — the four websites services (review, control-plane, botsite, dashboard)
projects.reliable-grace: the LIVE superbot production fleet — the real bot worker and its live control panel, plus three parallel copies of the websites estate pending consolidation; also hosts Postgres ×2 (infra, not web surfaces — not listed here)

sites.title: program review site
sites.description: public program review — the link shared by Anthropic email

sites.title: control plane (this app)
sites.description: owner console — readiness board, fleet, orders, this directory
sites.notes: the page you are reading lives here.

sites.title: botsite (arcade + testing)
sites.description: the bot-facing site — arcade and testing tasks
sites.notes: the superbot-websites project's own botsite URL is not recorded in this repo — repo docs/config record only the reliable-grace parallel copy's hostname (botsite-production-cfd7, listed below as a duplicate). Honest absence, not a dead link.

sites.title: dashboard (websites estate)
sites.notes: the superbot-websites project's own dashboard URL is not recorded in this repo — repo docs/config record only the reliable-grace parallel copy's hostname (dashboard-production-a91b, listed below as a duplicate). Honest absence, not a dead link.

sites.title: superbot worker (the real bot)
sites.description: the live production Discord bot itself
sites.notes: REAL production surface, not a duplicate. Background worker — no public URL by design, so no probe; its liveness is Discord-side, not HTTP.

sites.title: superbot live control panel
sites.description: the LIVE Discord-OAuth control panel of the production bot
sites.notes: REAL distinct production surface, not a duplicate (fleet inventory verified 2026-07-12 via the Railway account token). Its hostname is not recorded in this repo. Caveat recorded honestly: this repo's docs associate dashboard-production-a91b with the websites dashboard/ deploy (docs/dashboard.md, app/config.py deploy targets) — if that turns out to be this same service, fold the two rows after OQ-RAILWAY-PROJECT-SPLIT.
